name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_tsrc_utbl_asset_perf_maint_kpi25_1
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_tsrc' AS schema_name,
  'utbl_asset_perf_maint_kpi25_1' AS table_name,
  'MANAGED' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`constructiondate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`constructiondate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`disposaldate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`disposaldate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`ConstructionDatePlus6Months` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`ConstructionDatePlus6Months` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`ConstructionDatePlus6MonthsYN` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`ConstructionDatePlus6MonthsYN` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`EarliestStartDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`EarliestStartDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`scheduleddate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`scheduleddate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`scheduledinspid` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`scheduledinspid` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`CompletedInspId` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`CompletedInspId` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`NonCompliantDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`NonCompliantDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`ScheduledStatus` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`ScheduledStatus` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`AssessmentDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`AssessmentDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END)) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`constructiondate` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`constructiondate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`constructiondate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`disposaldate` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`disposaldate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`disposaldate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`ConstructionDatePlus6Months` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`ConstructionDatePlus6Months` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`ConstructionDatePlus6Months` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`ConstructionDatePlus6MonthsYN` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`ConstructionDatePlus6MonthsYN` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`ConstructionDatePlus6MonthsYN` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`EarliestStartDate` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`EarliestStartDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`EarliestStartDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`scheduleddate` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`scheduleddate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`scheduleddate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`scheduledinspid` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`scheduledinspid` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`scheduledinspid` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`CompletedInspId` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`CompletedInspId` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`CompletedInspId` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`NonCompliantDate` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`NonCompliantDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`NonCompliantDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`ScheduledStatus` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`ScheduledStatus` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`ScheduledStatus` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`AssessmentDate` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`AssessmentDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`AssessmentDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END)) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'constructiondate|disposaldate|ConstructionDatePlus6Months|ConstructionDatePlus6MonthsYN|EarliestStartDate|DueDate|scheduleddate|scheduledinspid|CompletedInspId|Completeddate|NonCompliantDate|ScheduledStatus|AssessmentDate' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_tsrc`.`utbl_asset_perf_maint_kpi25_1`
